# dokku_app_network (Resource)

Manages the network properties of a Dokku app (`dokku network:set`), attaching it to one or more Docker networks. Changing attach_post_create, attach_post_deploy, or initial_network requires an app deploy or rebuild to actually move a running container.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)

### Optional

- `attach_post_create` (List of String) Networks to attach after the container is created but before it is started. Commonly used for cross-app networking.
- `attach_post_deploy` (List of String) Networks to attach after a successful deploy but before the proxy is updated. Used when healthchecks must be invoked first.
- `bind_all_interfaces` (Boolean) Whether the app binds to all network interfaces (0.0.0.0) instead of just the internal interface.
- `initial_network` (String) Network to attach at container creation. Typically blocks access to services and external routing.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
